title: 14.-Contract 31900042 Amendment: CivicPlus for an Online Recreation Registration and Reservation System (CivicRec)

sections.recommendation:
Adopt a Resolution authorizing the City Manager to amend Contract No. 31900042 with
CivicPlus, Inc. to provide an online recreation registration and reservation system
(CivicRec) by increasing the contract amount by $28,000, for a total not to exceed
amount of $181,756, and extending the expiration date from November 30, 2025 to
November 30, 2026.
sections.fiscal_impacts:
Funding for the $28,000 contract amendment is subject to appropriation in the FY 2026
budget in General Fund (account code 011-52-543-570-0000-000-461-613130).
sections.current_situation:
The Parks, Recreation, & Waterfront Department’s Recreation Division manages facility
reservations, program scheduling, activity registrations, scholarships, contract
instructors, coaches, teams, leagues, equipment, supplies, inventory, staff scheduling,
marketing, advertising and payment for all of the aforementioned programs. These
functions are being performed using a combination of manual and automated systems,
including an off-the-shelf online software system (CivicRec) provided by CivicPlus, Inc.
The City needs to extend the contract with CivicPlus, Inc. for one additional year.
sections.background:
The City of Berkeley’s Parks, Recreation and Waterfront Department (PRW) provides a
wide range of recreation facilities, programs, classes, and events for Berkeley residents
and non-resident community members. The Recreation Division operates two swimming
pools, four community centers, 11 sports fields, three remote residential camp sites, a
skate park, a summer day camp program, and a wide variety of special events and
activities at various locations throughout the City. To manage the City’s Recreation
programs and services, the City implemented CivicRec, an online recreation registration
and reservation system provided by CivicPlus, Inc. in 2018.

Contract 31900042 Amendment with CivicPlus for Online Registration and CONSENT CALENDAR
Reservation Recreation Services June 3, 2025
ENVIRONMENTAL SUSTAINABILITY AND CLIMATE IMPACTS
There are no negative environmental impacts associated with this contract amendment
for one additional year using the CivicRec online registration system by CivicPlus, Inc.
sections.rationale:
This contract amendment will ensure efficient and uninterrupted Recreation Division
business operations. This system helps the City with Strategic Plan goal number 9 to
be a customer-focused organization that provides excellent, timely, easily accessible
service and information to the community.
sections.alternatives:
None
CONTACT PERSON
Stephanie Chu, Recreation and Youth Services Manager, 510-981-7000
Justin Pitcher, Recreation Program Supervisor, 510-981-7000
sections.attachments:
1: Resolution
Page 2
Page 3 of 3
RESOLUTION NO. ##,###-N.S.
CONTRACT NO. 31900042 AMENDMENT WITH CIVICPLUS, INC. FOR AN ONLINE
RECREATION REGISTRATION AND RESERVATION SYSTEM CALLED CIVICREC
WHEREAS, on November 30, 2018, the City entered into contract No. 31900042 with
CivicPlus, Inc. to provide an online recreation registration and reservation system called
CivicRec to replace the existing software system; and
WHEREAS, this amendment will add funds and extend the contract for one more year,
through November 30, 2026 that allows the City to offer continued online recreation
registration and reservation services; and
WHEREAS, funding for the $28,000 contract amendment is subject to appropriation in
the FY 2026 budget in General Fund (account code 011-52-543-570-0000-000-461-
613130).
NOW THEREFORE, BE IT RESOLVED by the Council of the City of Berkeley that the
City Manager is hereby authorized to execute a contract amendment to contract No.
31900042 with CivicPlus, Inc. to provide an online recreation registration and
reservation system called CivicRec by increasing the contract amount by $28,000, for a
total not to exceed amount of $181,756, and extending the expiration date from
November 30, 2025 to November 30, 2026.
